entities.name: SOYBEAN
entities.description: A commercial crop emerging in sub-Saharan Africa with low productivity on smallholder farms

entities.name: SUB-SAHARAN AFRICA
entities.description: The region where the study on soybean productivity and profitability was conducted

entities.name: PHOSPHORUS FERTILIZER
entities.description: A nutrient input required for optimum soybean growth and yield

entities.name: INOCULANTS
entities.description: The application of rhizobium strains to enhance biological nitrogen fixation

entities.name: RHIZOBIUM STRAINS
entities.description: Bacteria used in inoculants to facilitate nitrogen fixation in soybean

entities.name: BIOLOGICAL NITROGEN FIXATION
entities.description: The process of converting atmospheric nitrogen into a usable form for the plant

entities.name: YIELD
entities.description: The amount of soybean produced, which is influenced by phosphorus and inoculants

entities.name: PROFITABILITY
entities.description: The financial gain from soybean production on smallholder farms

entities.name: SMALLHOLDER FARMS
entities.description: Farming systems characterized by small land holdings and subsistence practices in SSA

entities.name: PHOSPHORUS USE EFFICIENCY
entities.description: The efficiency with which soybean plants utilize applied phosphorus

entities.name: PARTIAL FACTOR PRODUCTIVITY OF P
entities.description: A measure of yield increase per unit of phosphorus applied

entities.name: AGRONOMIC EFFICIENCY OF P
entities.description: The efficiency of phosphorus fertilizer in increasing crop yield

entities.name: VALUE COST RATIO
entities.description: An economic indicator used to measure the profitability of fertilizer and inoculant use

entities.name: GHANA
entities.description: A country in sub-Saharan Africa where on-farm demonstrations were conducted

entities.name: KENYA
entities.description: A country in sub-Saharan Africa where on-farm demonstrations were conducted

entities.name: MALAWI
entities.description: A country in sub-Saharan Africa where on-farm demonstrations were conducted

entities.description: A country in sub-Saharan Africa where on-farm demonstrations were conducted

entities.description: A country in sub-Saharan Africa where on-farm demonstrations were conducted

entities.name: UGANDA
entities.description: A country in sub-Saharan Africa where on-farm demonstrations were conducted

entities.name: ZAMBIA
entities.description: A country in sub-Saharan Africa where on-farm demonstrations were conducted

entities.name: SOIL ORGANIC MATTER
entities.description: A soil property that determines yield response and phosphorus use efficiency

entities.name: NET PRESENT VALUE
entities.description: A financial metric indicating that investments in P fertilizer and inoculants generate profits over time
